description: The skagen Denmark Collection reflects creative Danish spirit with clean, elegant designs, creative craftsmanship and technical perfection. The small seaside village of Skagen, Denmark with its natural purity and beauty, continues to be the inspiration for all Skagen Denmark products. Choose this watch to express exquisite taste and attention to detail.Case diameter: 35 mmCase thickness: 3 mmDial shape: RoundWarranty: International Limited Lifetime WarrantyStainless steel case Genuine leather strap with a tang claspBlue-black two tone dial with metallic handsBranding at the 12 hour markDate aperture at the 6 hour markScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering or in light rain
